wikitext:
The '''[[S&P 500]]''' [[stock market index]], maintained by [[Standard & Poor's]], comprises 500 [[market capitalization|large-cap]] American companies covering about 75 percent of the American equity market by capitalization. The index is weighted by market capitalization, so large companies account for relatively more of the index. The index constituents and the constituent weights are updated regularly using rules published by Standard & Poor's. The index constituents listed below were current as of the start of the trading day of February 15, 2013. ==Recent changes to the list of S&P 500 Components== Standard & Poors updates the components of the S&P 500 periodically, typically in response to acquisitions, or to keep the index up to date as various companies grow or shrink in value. {| class="wikitable sortable" |- | ! colspan="2" | Added ! colspan="2" | Removed |- | Date || Ticker || Company || Ticker || Company || Reason |- |February 15, 2013 || PVH || [[PVH Corp.]] || BIG || [[Big Lots Inc.]] || Market capitalization changes {{cite web|url=http://www.standardandpoors.com/indices/articles/en/us/?assetID=1245347280028 |title=PVH Set to Join S&P 500; ... |publisher=standardandpoors.com|date=2013-02-07|accessdate=2013-02-16}} |- |January 2, 2013 || ABBV || [[AbbVie]] || FII || [[Federated Investors]] || ABBV spun off from Abbott Labs (ABT) {{cite web|url=http://www.standardandpoors.com/indices/articles/en/us/?assetID=1245345385447 |title=AbbVie Set to Join S&P 100 & 500; ... |publisher=standardandpoors.com|date=2012-12-20|accessdate=2012-12-26}} |- |December 24, 2012 || DLPH || [[Delphi Automotive]] || TIE || [[Titanium Metals]] || TIE acquired by Precision Cast Parts (PCP) {{cite web|url=http://www.standardandpoors.com/indices/articles/en/us/?assetID=1245345188426 |title=Delphi Automotive Set to Join S&P 500 |publisher=standardandpoors.com|date=2012-12-18|accessdate=2012-12-26}} |- |December 12, 2012 || GRMN || [[Garmin Ltd.]] || RRD || [[R.R.
